title: Create all-locale HIG evidence matrix and finding taxonomy
summary: Created the durable repo-managed HIG evidence matrix at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-ui-matrix/ with per-locale gate_state, scoped surface coverage, finding taxonomy (HIG-<LOCALE_UPPER>-<NNN>), and downstream slice pointers. HIG-DE-001 recorded as the single open finding (in-progress; source fix shipped, rerun screenshot still missing). 17 non-German locales recorded as blocked-on-native-review. 0 locales claimed hig-ui-reviewed.

validation.python3 automation/supervisor/run_next.p: ran (selected app-localization-hig-evidence-matrix before this slice landed)

not_claimed: any locale beyond German is native-reviewed
RTL mirroring for ar has been proven on Owlory surfaces
residual_risk: Matrix is a planning index, not a screenshot or device proof.
HIG-DE-001 is in-progress: source fix landed under app-localization-evening-reflection-nudge-routing, rerun screenshot evidence still missing.
17 non-German locales remain blocked-on-native-review for HIG gate purposes.
The matrix must be updated when new HIG gate slices run; it is not auto-generated.
